task_name: Geometry Optimization: Find the Maximum Value of MN and Its Relation to the Radius

subtask1.query: Please read workspace/query.md (the problem statement) and refer to context/asset.jpg (the geometry diagram). After completing the derivation, output the answer file (e.g. answer.md) in the current directory.
deliverables: The file must clearly state the maximum value of MN
The file must clearly state the relationship between the maximum value of MN and the radius
